expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: In result.md: "Checkpoint enforcement focus: developer smoke checklist derived from P1 + `[ANALOG-GATE]` — Met." It cites `skill_snapshot/README.md` stating "developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md ... derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios during Phase 7" and `finalPlanSummary.mjs` extracting rows with `<P1>` or `[ANALOG-GATE]`.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: In result.md: "Alignment with primary phase under test: Phase 7 — Met." It references `skill_snapshot/SKILL.md` Phase 7 definition (promote to `qa_plan_final.md`, generate `context/final_plan_summary_<feature-id>.md`, etc.), `skill_snapshot/reference.md` Phase 7 artifact contract, and `finalPlanSummary.mjs` generating Phase 7-linked outputs including `context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md`.
